title: Dimensions of Ores
description: Adds ore-specific dimensions including the classic Diamond Portal. Infinite resources for NeoForge.
body:
# Dimensions of Ores

### [Report issues](https://github.com/TheLunarix/Dimensions-of-Ores/issues)
### [Leave a comment](https://github.com/TheLunarix/Dimensions-of-Ores/discussions)
# 
![Banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70d1e99c222ce4d30208b0ef7daa7950a6b93021.jpeg)

**Dimensions of Ores** is a NeoForge mod inspired by a discontinued project, [_Bertii's_ The Ore Dimensions Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-ore-dimensions), and a classic mod, [_luxmiyu's_ Any Dimension Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/any-dimension-mod-1-7-10/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&showAlphaFiles=hide). It adds dedicated, ore-specific dimensions to provide infinite access to all vanilla ores.

Say goodbye to resource scarcity!


**You can report any issues you find [here](https://github.com/TheLunarix/Dimensions-of-Ores-Issues/issues) and you can discuss about this mod [here.](https://github.com/TheLunarix/Dimensions-of-Ores/discussions)**


## Core Purpose & Features

This mod is designed to serve as a **late-game utility** or an accessible way to manage large-scale projects.

* **Infinite Resource Access:** Provides endless quantities of every vanilla ore (from Coal to Netherite).
* **Modern Alternative:** An updated and maintained version of similar concepts for newer Minecraft versions.
* **Seamless Integration:** Uses a familiar, Nether-style portal system that feels vanilla-friendly.


## Added Dimensions (10 Total)

The mod introduces a custom dimension for each of the following vanilla ores:

* **Coal**
* **Iron**
* **Copper**
* **Gold**
* **Lapis Lazuli**
* **Redstone**
* **Diamond**
* **Emerald**
* **Quartz**
* **Netherite**


## Accessing the Dimensions

Each ore dimension is accessed via its **own dedicated, custom-framed portal**, similar to the Nether portal.

![All portals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/630be7ebc0b2a8d944380657761995c43e9ce213_0.webp)

**Portal Activation:**

Each portal requires a **unique activator item**, crafted by surrounding a **Flint and Steel** with **8 pieces of the corresponding ore**.

| Components | Placement |
| :--- | :--- |
| **8 x Corresponding Ore Item** | Surrounding the Flint and Steel. |
| **1 x Flint and Steel** | In the center. |

![Diamond Portal Igniter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8029c04fcce64f53c3af9891edd691cbf0260707.png)

## Extra Notes & Design Details

* **Development Tools:** This mod was brought to life using [MCreator.](https://mcreator.net/) I would like to extend my sincere gratitude to the MCreator developers for providing such a powerful tool that empowers community creativity.
* **Shaders Used:** Gallery screenshots utilize the [Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla) shader pack.
* **Thoughtful Design:**
    * The Coal Dimension is made of Coal Ore blocks rather than Coal Blocks, preventing the dimension from being entirely flammable.
    * The Quartz Dimension is made of Nether Quartz Ore instead of Quartz Blocks, because unlike other ores Quartz Blocks cannot be converted back into Nether Quartz.
